nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 77. West wind around 3 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely after 2pm. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Partly sunny. High near 90, with temperatures falling to around 86 in the afternoon. Heat index values as high as 102. Northwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Some of the storms could produce heavy rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 75. East wind 2 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
